message:
fix(codegen): Migrate assert_stmt.zig to builder API

- Replace all emit calls with b.write/b.writeIndent
- Use captureExpr + emitValue for genExpr calls
- Pattern: capture expressions → build with builder → flush once
- 15 emit + 3 genExpr calls migrated
- Tests passing: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1
